docs.title: SPM
docs.description: Statistical Parametric Mapping refers to the construction and assessment of spatially extended statistical processes used to test hypotheses about functional imaging data. These ideas have been instantiated in a free and open source software that is called SPM.
literature: Tierney, T. M., Alexander, N. A., Ashburner, J., & et al. (2025). SPM 25: Open Source Neuroimaging Analysis Software. Journal of Open Source Software, 10(110), 8103. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.08103
